agent_trace.summary: [已完成] Redis/Valkey迁移评估万户级计划已制定，含配额、节奏与分解规则。

tumen_quota.name: Redis许可变更与Valkey项目基础研究
tumen_quota.description: 深入理解Redis许可证变更细节（从BSD到新许可证，变更原因）；研究Valkey的起源、治理模式及其与Redis的关系。

tumen_quota.name: 技术兼容性与云服务支持分析
tumen_quota.description: 比较Redis与Valkey的技术兼容性（API、协议、数据格式）；调查主要云服务提供商（AWS ElastiCache, Google Memorystore等）对Valkey的支持情况。

tumen_quota.name: 社区迁移经验与未来发展评估
tumen_quota.description: 收集社区迁移经验和潜在问题；审查Valkey的开发路线图和社区健康状况。

tumen_quota.name: 综合评估报告撰写与迁移策略建议
tumen_quota.description: 整合所有研究成果，撰写包含Redis许可证分析、Valkey项目概述、技术比较、云厂商支持分析、迁移可行性评估的综合技术评估报告；提出明确的迁移推荐和策略。

updates.decomposition_rule: 各万户级任务将逐级分解。每个万户（tumen）任务将分解为10个千户（qianhu）任务；每个千户任务分解为10个百户（baihu）任务；每个百户任务分解为10个十户（shihu）任务。此规则确保1:10的层级分解一致性，不得跳级。
updates.reporting_cycle: 各万户级任务需在其指定截止日期内提交阶段性成果报告；最终综合评估报告需在任务启动后7天内提交。

meta.stage_description: 中枢将征调令转成万户级配额与节奏计划。

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 万户级任务已按1:10分解为10个千户级子任务，并已分配。

mingghan_allocations.title: Research Redis License Change
mingghan_allocations.description: Investigate the details of Redis's license change (from BSD to what, reasons behind it) and analyze its implications for the migration evaluation.

mingghan_allocations.title: Research Valkey Project Overview
mingghan_allocations.description: Research Valkey's origin, governance model, and its relationship to Redis to understand its foundational aspects.

mingghan_allocations.title: Compare Redis & Valkey Technical Compatibility (API/Protocol)
mingghan_allocations.description: Conduct a technical comparison of Redis and Valkey focusing on API, protocol, and data format compatibility to identify potential migration hurdles.

mingghan_allocations.title: Compare Redis & Valkey Technical Differences (Performance/Features)
mingghan_allocations.description: Conduct a technical comparison of Redis and Valkey focusing on performance characteristics and feature differences beyond basic compatibility.

mingghan_allocations.title: Investigate Cloud Provider Support
mingghan_allocations.description: Investigate major cloud provider support for both Redis and Valkey (e.g., AWS ElastiCache, Google Memorystore) to assess deployment options.

mingghan_allocations.title: Gather Community Migration Experiences
mingghan_allocations.description: Collect information on community migration experiences from Redis to Valkey, including potential issues, success stories, and best practices.

mingghan_allocations.title: Review Valkey Development & Community Health
mingghan_allocations.description: Review Valkey's development roadmap, community health, and future prospects to gauge its long-term viability.

mingghan_allocations.title: Assess Migration Feasibility
mingghan_allocations.description: Synthesize findings from all research tasks to assess the overall feasibility of migrating from Redis to Valkey, considering technical, operational, and strategic factors.

mingghan_allocations.title: Formulate Migration Recommendation & Strategy
mingghan_allocations.description: Based on the feasibility assessment and technical analysis, formulate a clear recommendation (whether to migrate and migration strategy) for the team.

mingghan_allocations.title: Compile Comprehensive Technical Evaluation Report
mingghan_allocations.description: Compile all research findings, analyses, and recommendations into a comprehensive technical evaluation report, ensuring clarity and completeness.

updates.progress: Decomposition complete. All 10 mingghan-level tasks have been allocated.

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] 千户级任务已按1:10分解为10个百户级子任务，并已分配。

jaghun_allocations.title: Redis License Change Analysis
jaghun_allocations.description: Conduct in-depth research on the Redis license change, specifically identifying the previous and new licenses, and the stated reasons behind the change in March 2024. This includes gathering official announcements and community discussions.

jaghun_allocations.title: Valkey Origin and Relationship to Redis
jaghun_allocations.description: Investigate Valkey's origins, including its initial fork from Redis, the key individuals or organizations involved in its creation, and its stated relationship and goals concerning Redis.

jaghun_allocations.title: Valkey Governance and Community Health
jaghun_allocations.description: Research Valkey's governance model (e.g., foundation, open-source community structure), its current community health (e.g., active contributors, forum activity), and its development roadmap.

jaghun_allocations.title: Technical Compatibility: API and Protocol
jaghun_allocations.description: Compare Redis and Valkey at the API and protocol level to identify any differences or divergences that could impact application compatibility. Document any known incompatibilities or required code changes.

jaghun_allocations.title: Technical Compatibility: Data Formats and Features
jaghun_allocations.description: Compare Redis and Valkey regarding data format compatibility, persistence mechanisms, and specific feature differences (e.g., modules, data structures, clustering features). Identify any potential data migration challenges.

jaghun_allocations.title: Cloud Provider Support: AWS ElastiCache & Google Memorystore
jaghun_allocations.description: Investigate the current and planned support for Redis and Valkey on AWS ElastiCache and Google Memorystore. Document available versions, feature parity, and any specific migration tools or guidance provided by these vendors.

jaghun_allocations.title: Cloud Provider Support: Other Major Vendors
jaghun_allocations.description: Investigate the current and planned support for Redis and Valkey on other major cloud providers, such as Azure Cache for Redis, DigitalOcean, or other relevant managed services. Document their offerings and any unique considerations.

jaghun_allocations.title: Community Migration Experiences and Best Practices
jaghun_allocations.description: Gather information on community experiences regarding migration from Redis to Valkey. Identify common challenges, successful strategies, and best practices shared by early adopters or those contemplating migration.

jaghun_allocations.title: Migration Issues and Valkey Development Roadmap
jaghun_allocations.description: Identify potential technical and operational issues that might arise during a migration from Redis to Valkey. Review Valkey's development roadmap to understand future directions and potential impacts on migration or long-term stability.

jaghun_allocations.title: Comprehensive Migration Feasibility and Recommendation
jaghun_allocations.description: Synthesize all collected research data to perform a comprehensive migration feasibility assessment. Based on this, formulate a clear recommendation on whether to migrate from Redis to Valkey, including a proposed migration strategy if recommended.

meta.stage_description: 千户级执行并向下分解到百户级。

arban_allocations.title: Redis License Change - Original & New
arban_allocations.description: Identify Redis's original license (BSD) and its new license (e.g., RSALv2, SSPL), detailing their key terms.

arban_allocations.title: Redis License Change - Reasons
arban_allocations.description: Investigate and document the primary reasons and motivations behind Redis's license change in March 2024.

arban_allocations.title: Valkey Origins & Relationship
arban_allocations.description: Research Valkey's inception, its founding principles, and its direct relationship and divergence from Redis.

arban_allocations.title: Valkey Governance & Community
arban_allocations.description: Analyze Valkey's project governance model, key maintainers, and its overall community structure and health.

arban_allocations.title: Technical Compatibility - API/Protocol
arban_allocations.description: Compare Redis and Valkey for API and protocol compatibility, identifying any significant differences or breaking changes.

arban_allocations.title: Technical Compatibility - Data Formats/Features
arban_allocations.description: Evaluate data format compatibility, persistence mechanisms, and any notable feature differences between Redis and Valkey.

arban_allocations.title: Cloud Provider Support - AWS
arban_allocations.description: Research AWS ElastiCache's current and planned support for both Redis and Valkey.

arban_allocations.title: Cloud Provider Support - GCP/Azure
arban_allocations.description: Investigate Google Memorystore and Azure Cache for Redis's support status regarding Redis and Valkey.

arban_allocations.title: Community Migration Experiences
arban_allocations.description: Collect and summarize community experiences, challenges, and success stories related to migrating from Redis to Valkey.

arban_allocations.title: Valkey Roadmap & Future
arban_allocations.description: Review Valkey's official development roadmap, future features, and assess the project's long-term viability and community engagement.
